questionHtml: Part of the graph is above the t-axis and part is below. Outline why the areas between the t-axis and the curve for these two parts are likely to be the same.
markschemeHtml:
area represents the total change in flux «linkage» ✓

the change in flux is the same going in and out ✓

«when magnet is approaching» flux increases to a maximum ✓

«when magnet is receding» flux decreases to zero ✓

«so areas must be the same»

meta.title: Part of the graph is above the t-axis and part is below. Outline why the areas between the t-axis and the curve for these two parts are likely to be the same.
